I checked your calendar for 2024-05-19. You already have:
- Project Kick-off — 10:00–11:00 (confirmed)
- One-on-One with Manager — 11:00–11:30 (confirmed)

So 10:00 is not available. Suggested alternative times that day (all 1 hour):
- 11:30–12:30 (immediately after your one-on-one) — my recommended slot
- 09:00–10:00 (before the kick-off)
- Any afternoon time (e.g., 14:00–15:00) if you prefer

Before I create the event, please confirm:
1. Which time would you like (I’ll use 11:30–12:30 unless you pick another)?  
2. Title for the meeting (or I can use “Follow-up Meeting”)  
3. Who should be invited (email addresses), or should it be on your calendar only?  
4. Location (or leave blank / set as virtual)  
5. Short description to include (suggestion: “Follow-up to review action items and next steps.” — okay to use?)

Once you confirm these, I’ll schedule it.
